scenario: Single filer with W-2 wages $55,000 and LLC qualified expenses $10,000 — Form 8863 Part II Lifetime Learning Credit 20% × $10,000 = $2,000
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case — Education Credits module (Form 8863 Part II LLC); IRC §25A(c); 20% × $10,000; AGI below $80,000 phase-out
